name: FileIcon
description: Renders an SVG icon that corresponds to a given file type or extension. Falls back to a generic file icon for unrecognised types.
usage_guidelines: Pass the file extension string (e.g. 'pdf', 'docx') as the type prop.
Use the size prop to scale the icon uniformly — it sets both width and height.
Use 'directory' as the type to render a folder icon.
Unrecognised extensions render a generic file icon automatically.

type.description: File extension or type key. Supported values: 'pdf', 'xlsx', 'docx', 'ppt', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'directory'. Any other value renders the generic file icon.

size.description: Width and height of the icon in pixels.

styling_info.visual_description: Each file type maps to a distinct coloured SVG icon. The directory type renders a folder icon. All other types fall back to a neutral file icon.

Do: Use lowercase extension strings to match the switch cases
Set an appropriate size relative to surrounding text or list items
Use 'directory' for folder entries in file-tree UIs
Dont: Don't pass a full filename — extract the extension first
Don't rely on the component for access control or MIME validation
